description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a polymer grip featuring ergonomic finger grooves and textured panels for enhanced handling. The slide is elongated, suggesting a competition or tactical model, and is equipped with prominent front and rear sights, including a red fiber optic front sight for improved aiming. The trigger guard is generously sized and rounded, providing ample space for gloved use, and the trigger itself is skeletonized for reduced weight. The magazine is shown separately, revealing a standard double-stack design with visible witness holes and a flat baseplate. Subtle slide serrations are present for improved manipulation, and there are minimalistic markings on the slide, including a small metallic plaque. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and polymer components typical of contemporary handguns.
description: A sleek, black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, elongated slide, and a separate double-stack magazine. Features include a red fiber optic front sight, slide serrations, and minimalistic slide markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, front sight, and the narrow profile of the slide.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the slide, grip texture, trigger guard, and the magazine placed beside the handgun.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear sight, slide serrations, and the backstrap contour of the grip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slide's metallic plaque, grip details, and the magazine positioned next to the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with pronounced finger grooves and a stippled texture for secure handling. It appears to be made of black polymer with subtle ergonomic shaping, including a slight palm swell and a beavertail extension at the top. The sides feature a checkered pattern for additional grip, and the backstrap is gently curved for comfort. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, rounded, and robust, with a smooth finish and no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. It is thick enough to provide structural strength and appears to be integrated seamlessly with the frame. There are no additional accessories or texturing, giving it a clean, functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, consistent with a target or competition-style handgun. It is not visibly threaded or ported, and there are no compensators or external attachments. The exterior has a matte black finish, matching the slide, and no distinctive markings are visible on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a small metallic plaque on the right side, possibly indicating the model or manufacturer, but no detailed engravings or serial numbers are visible. The left side appears unmarked, and there are no decorative patterns or prominent logos. The markings are minimal and understated.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular with slightly beveled edges for easier insertion and removal. It lacks any finger rest or flared extension, and there are no visible logos or texturing. The design is simple and functional, matching the utilitarian style of the handgun.
